title: IntegrityReport V1
description: Scientific integrity assessment report. Aggregates results from multiple IntegrityChecks. Content-addressed via SHA-256 of RFC 8785 (JCS) canonical JSON. Used by RDI fail-closed gate to block publication of unverified assets.

report_id.description: Content-addressed identifier: SHA-256 hex digest of RFC 8785 (JCS) canonical JSON of this object excluding report_id itself.

target_ref.description: ArtifactRef V1 of the artifact being checked.

overall_status.description: 'fail' if any blocking check failed. 'advisory_only' if all blocking checks passed but advisory checks have findings. 'pass' if all checks passed.

blocking_failures.description: Check IDs of failed blocking checks. Empty array if overall_status is 'pass' or 'advisory_only'.

domain_pack_version.description: Version of the domain pack used for checks.

run_id.description: Run in which this report was generated.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC Z timestamp of report creation.

duration_ms.description: Total time taken for all checks in milliseconds.

status.description: 'pass' means check succeeded. 'fail' means check found a problem. 'advisory' means informational finding. 'skipped' means check was not applicable.

severity.description: Whether this check is blocking (prevents publication) or advisory (informational).

evidence.description: Supporting evidence for the check result.

type.description: Type of evidence. V1 covers numerical/computational verification domains. V2 will add 'formal_proof' for mechanized verification workflows (see DESIGN_DEBT.md item 6).

artifact_ref.description: Optional reference to an artifact containing detailed evidence.

data.description: Structured data specific to the evidence type.
